questionHtml: The empirical formula of fructose is CH2O. Suggest why linoleic acid releases more energy per gram than fructose.
markschemeHtml:
ratio of oxygen to carbon in linoleic acid lower

OR

linoleic acid less oxidized

OR

linoleic acid more reduced

Accept “«average» oxidation state of carbon in linoleic acid is lower”.

meta.title: The empirical formula of fructose is CH2O. Suggest why linoleic acid releases more energy per gram than fructose.
